general.title: Interactive Spatial Plot [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions: Creates interactive, real-time visual explorations of single-cell spatial data for in-depth analysis. For color map strings, please refer to Built-in Continuous Color Scales in Python.\ Please refer to DUET Documentation and GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Stratify By
parameters.description: The annotation to stratify the dataset when generating interaction plots. If single annotation is passed, the dataset will be stratified by the unique labels in the annotation column. Use "None" without quotes to disable.

parameters.name: Color By
parameters.description: Color the points in the plot by either their corresponding feature or annotation

parameters.name: Annotation(s) to Highlight
parameters.description: Annotation(s) to visualize in the analysis. The interactive plot will show all the labels in the annotation(s) passed.

parameters.name: Feature to Highlight
parameters.description: Feature name in the analysis to use for coloring the cells in the scatter plot based on the feature value. Can't be used with Annotation.

parameters.name: Table
parameters.description: Source table to perform the visualization. Default is Original, referring to the raw dataset.

parameters.name: Dot Size
parameters.description: Size of dot in the plot.

parameters.name: Dot Transparency
parameters.description: Transparency of the dot in the plot.

parameters.name: Flip Vertical Axis
parameters.description: If True, flip the vertical axis.

parameters.name: Define Label Color Mapping
parameters.description: Name of the color map to use for labels in the plot. The color map should be appended through the Append Pin Color Rule template prior to the current visualization. The default "None" will allow the visualization to determine the color of labels automatically.

parameters.name: Figure DPI
parameters.description: The higher the DPI, the higher the image resolution.

parameters.name: Feature Color Scale
parameters.description: Color scale to use when dot colors are defined by features. Check the link in the template description.

parameters.name: Lower Colorbar Bound
parameters.description: The lower bound of the colorbar scale. The default 999 will set the upper bound to the minimum of the dataset.

parameters.name: Upper Colorbar Bound
parameters.description: The lower bound of the colorbar scale. The default -999 will set the upper bound to the minimum of the dataset.
